name: ILLMProvider
description: Contract for LLM provider adapters. Implementations bridge the domain core to a specific LLM backend (e.g. LiteLLM, OpenAI, Anthropic). The llm primitive reads the provider instance from context.deps.llm_provider.

methods.name: complete

params.name: kwargs
params.description: Additional provider-specific parameters (temperature, max_tokens, top_p, etc.)

methods.description: Send a single-turn completion request to the LLM. Returns a dict containing at minimum a 'content' key with the model's response text. May include 'usage', 'model', or 'finish_reason'.

methods.name: stream

params.name: kwargs
params.description: Additional provider-specific parameters (temperature, max_tokens, top_p, etc.)

methods.description: Stream completion tokens from the LLM. Yields string chunks of the model's response as they arrive.

behavioral_expectations: Must use abstract base class inheritance (ABC) — concrete implementations must subclass ILLMProvider
complete() must return a dict with at least a 'content' key containing the response text
stream() must yield string chunks, not structured objects
Messages must follow chat-style format with at least 'role' and 'content' keys per message
Must raise AdapterError when the LLM provider call fails
Provider-specific parameters (temperature, max_tokens, etc.) are passed via kwargs and must not cause errors if unsupported
